title: Strip graphiti-backed code down to a clean service shell
userStory: As a developer, I want the graphiti construction, extraction pipeline, and old endpoints removed so that the service is a clean FastAPI shell ready for the pgvector implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: graphiti client construction, the decompose + extraction-override pipeline, and the graphiti-backed capture/recall/profile implementations are deleted
The freeform text capture endpoint (POST /capture) is removed (not stubbed onto graphiti)
The FastAPI app still starts as a shell: config, logging, auth middleware, and a /health endpoint remain intact
No remaining import of graphiti_core or falkordb anywhere in the codebase (grep is clean)
Verify: the service boots and /health returns ok with no graph backend present
